title: Fix CI intent gate: fail-closed on JSON/git errors, explicit MK2_BASE_REF, PR template checklist

verification.plan: 1. Replace broad except Exception: pass in closed-intent amendment check with explicit subprocess.run() returncode inspection. 2. Allow only missing-path git errors (new intent files) to proceed; fail-closed on all other git/JSON failures. 3. Move MK2_BASE_REF to explicit env: key on gate step for clarity. 4. Add Governance Checklist to PR template with three checkboxes. 5. Verify gate passes locally with python3 tools/ci_gate.py. 6. Run CodeQL scan (0 alerts expected).

evidence.notes: Fixes silent fail-open bug in tools/ci_gate.py lines 166-181 where a bare except Exception: pass swallowed JSON parse errors and unexpected git failures, bypassing the closed-intent amendment requirement. Now uses subprocess.run() directly with explicit returncode check: missing-path errors (new intent files) are allowed; all other failures exit with actionable messages. Also moves MK2_BASE_REF assignment from $GITHUB_ENV indirection to explicit env: on the gate step, and adds a Governance Checklist section with three fail-closed checkboxes to the PR template.
